popularStory.headline: Blanche of Lancaster
popularStory.description: Blanche of Lancaster is one of those ladies of history more famous because of her children and the antics of her husband. Blanche’s life was pitifully short, but her legacy would see the unravelling o …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche of Lancaster於1342年3月25日出生在威爾士蒙姆爾格洛斯蒙特時，她的父親Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster33歲，母親Isabel de Beaumont22歲。她於1359年5月19日與John of Gaunt在英國英格蘭波克夏雷亞丁結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年9月12日在英國林可爾史爾波利布洛可 索可享年26歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanche of Lancaster于1342年3月25日出生在威尔士蒙姆爾格洛斯蒙特时，她的父亲Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster33岁，母亲Isabel de Beaumont22岁。她于1359年5月19日与John of Gaunt在英国英格兰波克夏雷亞丁结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年9月12日在英国林可爾史爾波利布洛可 索可享年26岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche of Lancaster was born on 25 March 1342, in Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster, was 33 and her mother, Isabel de Beaumont, was 22. She married John of Gaunt on 19 May 1359, in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 September 1368, in Bolingbroke Soke, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 26, and was buried in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche of Lancaster est née le 25 mars 1342, à Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Beaumont, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John of Gaunt le 19 mai 1359, à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 septembre 1368, à Bolingbroke Soke, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à St Paul's Cathedral, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche of Lancaster am 25. März 1342 in Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster 33 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Beaumont 22. Sie hat am 19. Mai 1359 in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom John of Gaunt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. September 1368 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Bolingbroke Soke, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche of Lancaster è nata il il 25 marzo 1342 nel Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Beaumont, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John of Gaunt il 19 maggio 1359, nel Reading, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Blanche of Lancasterが1342年3月25日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアグロスモントで生まれた時，父Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancasterは33歳，母Isabel de Beaumontは22歳であった。1359年5月19日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングでJohn of Gauntと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1368年9月12日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボリングブロク ソクで26歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト プアウル'ス カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche of Lancaster(이)가 1342년 3월 25일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 그로스몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Beaumont(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1359년 5월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 리딩에서 John of Gaunt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 9월 12일 영국 링코실르 볼링브로크 소크에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 폴'스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche of Lancaster nasceu em 25 de março de 1342, em Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Beaumont, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John of Gaunt em 19 de maio de 1359, em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche of Lancaster родилась 25 марта 1342 г. в местности гросмонт, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Beaumont, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John of Gaunt 19 мая 1359 г. в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 сентября 1368 г. в местности болингброк сок, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности ст поул'с кэтедраль, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John of Gaunt el 19 de mayo de 1359, en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas.
